mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
h.TRAN_TYPE h.TRAN_ID h.TRAN_NAME h.TRAN_TIME h.TRAN_RESULT h.TRAN_TYPE, h.TRAN_ID
ASC DESC
mapper.select: SELECT h.TRAN_SEQ AS tranSeq, h.TRAN_ID AS tranId, h.TRAN_TYPE AS tranType, h.TRAN_NAME AS tranName, h.TRAN_TIME AS tranTime, h.TRAN_RESULT AS tranResult FROM FWK_TRANS_DATA_HIS h WHERE h.TRAN_SEQ = #{tranSeq} ORDER BY h.TRAN_TYPE, h.TRAN_ID

SELECT h.TRAN_SEQ AS tranSeq, h.TRAN_ID AS tranId, h.TRAN_TYPE AS tranType, h.TRAN_NAME AS tranName, h.TRAN_RESULT AS tranResult, h.TRAN_FAIL_REASON AS tranFailReason, h.TRAN_FAIL_SQL AS tranFailSql FROM FWK_TRANS_DATA_HIS h WHERE h.TRAN_SEQ = #{tranSeq} AND h.TRAN_ID = #{tranId} AND h.TRAN_TYPE = #{tranType}
